details.question: 查询过去24小时CPU平均利用率超过80%的网元。

details.question: 找出GOLD级别VPN业务中，隧道实测时延超过SLA要求的记录。

details.generated_sql: WITH gold_vpn AS ( SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.max_latency_ms FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' ) SELECT gv.vpn_id, gv.vpn_name, gv.max_latency_ms AS sla_max_latency, t.tunnel_id, t.measured_latency_ms FROM gold_vpn gv JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', gv.vpn_id, '%') WHERE t.measured_latency_ms > gv.max_latency_ms ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_limit,
       t.tunnel_name, tp.latency_avg_ms AS actual_latency,
       ne_s.ne_name AS source, ne_d.ne_name AS dest
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tp ON t.tunnel_id = tp.tunnel_id

JOIN t_network_element ne_d ON t.dest_ne_id = ne_d.ne_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND tp.collect_time = (SELECT MAX(collect_time) FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi WHERE tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id)
  AND tp.latency_avg_ms > v.max_latency_ms;

details.question: 统计每台PE设备上所有物理接口的带宽利用率分布（空闲<30%/正常30-70%/繁忙70-90%/过载>90%），只看最新一个采集周期。
details.reason: 行数相同(18行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'overload', 'ne_name', 'idle', 'normal', 'busy'}; 多列{'normal_count', 'busy_count', 'ne_id', 'overload_count', 'idle_count'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT if_id, ne_id, in_bandwidth_usage_pct, out_bandwidth_usage_pct, collect_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY if_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ), latest_pe AS ( SELECT l.if_id, l.ne_id, GREATEST(COALESCE(l.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0), COALESCE(l.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) AS max_bw_pct FROM latest l JOIN t_network_element ne ON l.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_interface i ON l.if_id = i.if_id WHERE l.rn = 1 AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL' ) SELECT ne_id, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS idle_count, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct >= 30 AND max_bw_pct < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct >= 70 AND max_bw_pct < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS busy_count, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overload_count FROM latest_pe GROUP BY ne_id ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS t FROM t_interface_perf_kpi)
SELECT ne.ne_name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct < 30 THEN 1 END) AS idle,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct BETWEEN 30 AND 70 THEN 1 END) AS normal,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct BETWEEN 70 AND 90 THEN 1 END) AS busy,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 90 THEN 1 END) AS overload
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
CROSS JOIN latest l
WHERE k.collect_time = l.t AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY overload DESC;

details.question: 查看过去7天华北区域PE设备的每日平均CPU利用率趋势及环比变化。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成21行 vs 期望7行 [列差异: 缺列{'change', 'day', 'avg_cpu'}; 多列{'prev_day_cpu', 'day_over_day_change', 'dt', 'ne_id', 'daily_avg_cpu'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH daily_cpu AS ( SELECT k.ne_id, CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) AS dt, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS daily_avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE s.region = '华北' AND ne.role = 'PE' AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id, CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) ), with_prev AS ( SELECT *, LAG(daily_avg_cpu) OVER (PARTITION BY ne_id ORDER BY dt) AS prev_day_cpu FROM daily_cpu ) SELECT ne_id, dt, daily_avg_cpu, prev_day_cpu, daily_avg_cpu - prev_day_cpu AS day_over_day_change FROM with_prev ORDER BY ne_id, dt ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT DATE(k.collect_time) AS day, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE s.region = '华北' AND ne.role = 'PE'
    AND k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY DATE(k.collect_time)
)
SELECT day, ROUND(avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu,
       ROUND(avg_cpu - LAG(avg_cpu) OVER (ORDER BY day), 2) AS change
FROM daily ORDER BY day;

details.question: 找出SLA违规率最高的前5个VPN客户，统计每个客户的VPN数量、总违规次数和违规率（最近30天）。
details.reason: 行数相同(5行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'violations', 'total_samples'}; 多列{'total_violations', 'customer_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH recent AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id ), vpn_agg AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count, SUM(r.violation_count) AS total_violations, SUM(r.total_samples) AS total_samples, ROUND(SUM(r.violation_count) * 100.0 / SUM(r.total_samples), 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN recent r ON v.vpn_id = r.vpn_id GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ) SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_count, total_violations, violation_rate_pct FROM vpn_agg ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count,
    COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violations
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
)
SELECT customer_name, vpn_count, violations, total_samples,
  ROUND(violations * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_samples, 0), 2) AS violation_rate_pct
FROM stats WHERE total_samples > 0
ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;

details.question: 找出所有'单点故障'链路——两个站点之间只有一条物理链路、且该链路承载了GOLD级别VPN业务。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成7行 vs 期望22行 [列差异: 缺列{'site_a', 'site_b', 'bandwidth_mbps', 'distance_km'}; 多列{'vpn_name', 'link_id', 'site1', 'site2', 'vpn_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH site_pair_links AS ( SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site1, GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site2, COUNT(*) AS link_count, MIN(link_id) AS link_id FROM t_physical_link WHERE a_site_id IS NOT NULL AND z_site_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id), GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) SELECT sp.link_id, sp.site1, sp.site2, pl.link_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name FROM site_pair_links sp JOIN t_physical_link pl ON sp.link_id = pl.link_id JOIN t_tunnel t ON (t.associated_vpn_ids IS NOT NULL) AND ( (pl.a_ne_id = t.source_ne_id AND pl.z_ne_id = t.dest_ne_id) OR (pl.z_ne_id = t.source_ne_id AND pl.a_ne_id = t.dest_ne_id) ) JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%') ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH site_pair AS (
  SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s1,
         GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s2,
         COUNT(*) AS link_cnt, ARRAY_AGG(link_id) AS links
  FROM t_physical_link WHERE oper_status = 'UP'
  GROUP BY LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id), GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id)
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
gold_links AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT pl.link_id
  FROM t_physical_link pl
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON b.ne_id = pl.a_ne_id
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD','PLATINUM') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
)
SELECT pl.link_name, sa.site_name AS site_a, sz.site_name AS site_b,
       pl.bandwidth_mbps, pl.distance_km
FROM site_pair sp
JOIN t_physical_link pl ON pl.link_id = ANY(sp.links)
JOIN t_site sa ON sp.s1 = sa.site_id
JOIN t_site sz ON sp.s2 = sz.site_id
WHERE pl.link_id IN (SELECT link_id FROM gold_links);

details.question: 对比上周和本周各站点平均接口带宽利用率，找出增长超过20个百分点的站点。
details.reason: 行数相同(1行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'last_week', 'increase', 'this_week'}; 多列{'site_id', 'growth_pct', 'last_week_avg', 'this_week_avg'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH this_week AS ( SELECT i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name, AVG(COALESCE(k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) / 2 AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name ), last_week AS ( SELECT i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name, AVG(COALESCE(k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) / 2 AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14' DAY AND k.collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name ), site_this AS ( SELECT site_id, site_name, AVG(avg_bw_pct) AS this_week_avg FROM this_week GROUP BY site_id, site_name ), site_last AS ( SELECT site_id, site_name, AVG(avg_bw_pct) AS last_week_avg FROM last_week GROUP BY site_id, site_name ) SELECT t.site_id, t.site_name, l.last_week_avg, t.this_week_avg, t.this_week_avg - l.last_week_avg AS growth_pct FROM site_this t JOIN site_last l ON t.site_id = l.site_id WHERE t.this_week_avg - l.last_week_avg > 20 ORDER BY growth_pct DESC ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS wk,
    AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END
)
SELECT tw.site_name,
  ROUND(lw.avg_bw, 2) AS last_week, ROUND(tw.avg_bw, 2) AS this_week,
  ROUND(tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw, 2) AS increase
FROM weekly tw JOIN weekly lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id
WHERE tw.wk = 'THIS' AND lw.wk = 'LAST' AND (tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw) > 20
ORDER BY increase DESC;

details.question: 为每条GOLD级VPN业务计算健康评分（时延达标+25分，抖动达标+25分，丢包达标+25分，可用率达标+25分），输出评分低于75分的业务。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成3行 vs 期望2行 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_loss_pct', 'availability_pct', 'avg_latency_ms'}; 多列{'service_level', 'vpn_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH latest_sla AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) AS lat_met, COALESCE(sk.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) AS jit_met, COALESCE(sk.sla_loss_met, FALSE) AS loss_met, COALESCE(sk.sla_availability_met, FALSE) AS avail_met, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ), scores AS ( SELECT ls.vpn_id, (CASE WHEN ls.lat_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ls.jit_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ls.loss_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ls.avail_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score FROM latest_sla ls WHERE ls.rn = 1 ) SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.service_level, sc.health_score FROM scores sc JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sc.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND sc.health_score < 75 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH health AS (
  SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_latency_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_jitter_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_loss_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_availability_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS score,
    AVG(sk.e2e_latency_avg_ms) AS lat, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS loss,
    AVG(sk.availability_pct) AS avail
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
    AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
  GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
)
SELECT vpn_name, customer_name, ROUND(score, 1) AS health_score,
  ROUND(lat, 2) AS avg_latency_ms, ROUND(loss, 4) AS avg_loss_pct,
  ROUND(avail, 2) AS availability_pct
FROM health WHERE score < 75 ORDER BY score;

details.generated_sql: WITH latest_kpi AS ( SELECT if_id, oper_status AS kpi_oper_status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY if_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ) SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id, i.oper_status AS current_oper_status, lk.kpi_oper_status FROM t_interface i JOIN latest_kpi lk ON i.if_id = lk.if_id AND lk.rn = 1 WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND lk.kpi_oper_status = 'DOWN' ;

)

details.question: 找出最近7天设备平均温度超过其任一单板温度告警阈值的设备。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(1行) [列差异: 缺列{'avg_temp_c', 'board_temp_threshold'}; 多列{'ne_id', 'avg_temp', 'min_threshold'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH dev_avg_temp AS ( SELECT k.ne_id, AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) AS avg_temp FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id ), board_threshold AS ( SELECT b.ne_id, MIN(b.temperature_threshold) AS min_threshold FROM t_board b WHERE b.temperature_threshold IS NOT NULL GROUP BY b.ne_id ) SELECT d.ne_id, ne.ne_name, d.avg_temp, bt.min_threshold FROM dev_avg_temp d JOIN board_threshold bt ON d.ne_id = bt.ne_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON d.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE d.avg_temp > bt.min_threshold ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT ne.ne_name,
       ROUND(AVG(k.temperature_avg_c), 2) AS avg_temp_c,
       MAX(b.temperature_threshold) AS board_temp_threshold
FROM t_board b
JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id
WHERE b.temperature_threshold IS NOT NULL
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

  SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem,
         AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) AS avg_temp,
         AVG(k.alarm_critical_count + k.alarm_major_count) AS avg_alarm_pressure
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
    AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name
)
SELECT ne_name,
       (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_mem < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_alarm_pressure < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score,
       ROUND(avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu,
       ROUND(avg_mem, 2) AS avg_mem,
       ROUND(avg_temp, 2) AS avg_temp,
       ROUND(avg_alarm_pressure, 2) AS avg_alarm_pressure
FROM agg
WHERE (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_mem < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +

ORDER BY health_score, ne_name;

              WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END AS win,
         AVG(out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  GROUP BY if_id,
           CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
                WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw, 2) AS current_avg_pct,
       ROUND(pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS previous_avg_pct,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw - pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS growth_pct_point
FROM bucketed cur
JOIN bucketed pre ON cur.if_id = pre.if_id AND cur.win = 'CUR' AND pre.win = 'PRE'
JOIN t_interface i ON cur.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
ORDER BY growth_pct_point DESC, ne.ne_name, i.if_name
LIMIT 10;

group_cols: case when collect_time >= now() - interval '24' hours then 'cur' when collect_time >= now() - interval '48' hours then 'pre' end

details.question: 找出那些最新SLA指标已不达标，但其承载隧道最新KPI仍显示sla_violation=FALSE的VPN。
details.reason: 行数相同(25行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'sla_violation', 'sla_overall_met'}; 多列{'tunnel_id', 'vpn_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH latest_vpn_sla AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) AS overall_met, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ), failed_vpns AS ( SELECT vpn_id FROM latest_vpn_sla WHERE rn = 1 AND overall_met = FALSE ), latest_tunnel_kpi AS ( SELECT tk.tunnel_id, COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) AS sla_violation, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk.tunnel_id ORDER BY tk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ) SELECT DISTINCT fv.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name FROM failed_vpns fv JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON fv.vpn_id = v.vpn_id JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', fv.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON t.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE ltk.sla_violation = FALSE ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH latest_vpn AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
), latest_tunnel AS (
  SELECT tunnel_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY tunnel_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name, sk.sla_overall_met, tk.sla_violation
FROM latest_vpn lv
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON lv.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id AND lv.max_time = sk.collect_time
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN latest_tunnel lt ON t.tunnel_id = lt.tunnel_id
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON lt.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id AND lt.max_time = tk.collect_time
WHERE sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE AND tk.sla_violation = FALSE
ORDER BY v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name;

details.question: 找出最近7天路径切换次数最多且同时发生SLA违规的前5条隧道。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(5行) [列差异: 缺列{'violation_samples'}; 多列{'tunnel_id', 'violation_count'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH tunnel_stats AS ( SELECT tk.tunnel_id, SUM(COALESCE(tk.path_change_count, 0)) AS total_path_changes, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk WHERE tk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY tk.tunnel_id ) SELECT ts.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ts.total_path_changes, ts.violation_count FROM tunnel_stats ts JOIN t_tunnel t ON ts.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id WHERE ts.total_path_changes > 0 AND ts.violation_count > 0 ORDER BY ts.total_path_changes DESC LIMIT 5 ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT t.tunnel_name,
       SUM(k.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_samples
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_tunnel t ON k.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY t.tunnel_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY total_path_changes DESC, violation_samples DESC, t.tunnel_name
LIMIT 5;

details.question: 统计每个区域内PLATINUM业务的平均SLA达标率。
details.reason: 行数相同(5行)但值不同: 4行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_sla_hit_rate_pct'}; 多列{'avg_sla_met_pct'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH plat_sla AS ( SELECT v.vpn_id, s.region, COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) AS overall_met FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM' ) SELECT region, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN overall_met THEN 100.0 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS avg_sla_met_pct FROM plat_sla GROUP BY region ORDER BY avg_sla_met_pct ASC ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH region_vpn AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_id, s.region
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM'
), hit_rate AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT rv.region, ROUND(AVG(hr.hit_rate) * 100, 2) AS avg_sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM region_vpn rv
JOIN hit_rate hr ON rv.vpn_id = hr.vpn_id
GROUP BY rv.region
ORDER BY avg_sla_hit_rate_pct DESC, rv.region;

details.question: 查询每个客户在最近30天的平均月化丢包风险，定义为平均丢包率 × 业务月租费。

details.generated_sql: WITH vpn_loss AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id ) SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, ROUND(vl.avg_loss * COALESCE(v.monthly_fee, 0), 2) AS loss_risk_score FROM vpn_loss vl JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vl.vpn_id = v.vpn_id ORDER BY v.customer_id, loss_risk_score DESC ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH vpn_loss AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.monthly_fee,
         AVG(s.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.monthly_fee

ORDER BY loss_fee_risk DESC, customer_name;

details.question: 找出所有同时满足以下条件的PE：启用SRv6、存在LOW_LATENCY Policy、且最近7天平均CPU超过70%。

details.generated_sql: WITH srv6_pe AS ( SELECT ne.ne_id FROM t_network_element ne WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND COALESCE(ne.srv6_enabled, FALSE) = TRUE ), low_lat_pe AS ( SELECT DISTINCT sp.source_ne_id AS ne_id FROM t_srv6_policy sp WHERE sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY' ), high_cpu_pe AS ( SELECT k.ne_id FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70 ) SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name FROM srv6_pe s JOIN low_lat_pe ll ON s.ne_id = ll.ne_id JOIN high_cpu_pe hc ON s.ne_id = hc.ne_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.ne_id = ne.ne_id ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ne.ne_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_srv6_policy sp ON sp.source_ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
  AND ne.srv6_enabled = TRUE
  AND sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY'
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

details.generated_sql: WITH device_count AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS ne_count FROM t_network_element ne GROUP BY ne.site_id ), link_endpoints AS ( SELECT a_site_id AS site_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_physical_link WHERE a_site_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a_site_id UNION ALL SELECT z_site_id AS site_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_physical_link WHERE z_site_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY z_site_id ), link_agg AS ( SELECT site_id, SUM(cnt) AS link_endpoint_count FROM link_endpoints GROUP BY site_id ) SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, COALESCE(dc.ne_count, 0) AS device_count, COALESCE(la.link_endpoint_count, 0) AS link_endpoint_count FROM t_site s LEFT JOIN device_count dc ON s.site_id = dc.site_id LEFT JOIN link_agg la ON s.site_id = la.site_id ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH site_ne AS (
  SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS ne_count
  FROM t_network_element
  GROUP BY site_id
), site_link_end AS (
  SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS link_end_count
  FROM (
    SELECT a_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link
    UNION ALL
    SELECT z_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link
  ) x
  GROUP BY site_id
)
SELECT s.site_name,
       COALESCE(n.ne_count, 0) AS ne_count,
       COALESCE(l.link_end_count, 0) AS link_end_count
FROM t_site s
LEFT JOIN site_ne n ON s.site_id = n.site_id
LEFT JOIN site_link_end l ON s.site_id = l.site_id
ORDER BY ne_count DESC, link_end_count DESC, s.site_name;

details.question: 找出每个客户最近30天平均MOS最低的VPN。
details.reason: 完全匹配
details.generated_sql: WITH cust_mos AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, sk.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, AVG(sk.mos_score) AS avg_mos, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY v.customer_id ORDER BY AVG(sk.mos_score) ASC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY AND sk.mos_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, sk.vpn_id, v.vpn_name ) SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(avg_mos, 2) AS avg_mos FROM cust_mos WHERE rn = 1 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH vpn_mos AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, AVG(s.mos_score) AS avg_mos
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY avg_mos ASC NULLS LAST, vpn_id) AS rn
  FROM vpn_mos
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(avg_mos, 2) AS avg_mos
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY avg_mos ASC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

details.question: 找出最近30天内至少出现过3次SLA状态切换（达标/不达标变化）的VPN。
details.reason: 完全匹配
details.generated_sql: WITH sla_status AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, sk.collect_time, COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) AS met, LAG(COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE)) OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time) AS prev_met FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY ), switches AS ( SELECT vpn_id, COUNT(*) AS switch_count FROM sla_status WHERE prev_met IS NOT NULL AND met != prev_met GROUP BY vpn_id ) SELECT sw.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, sw.switch_count FROM switches sw JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sw.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sw.switch_count >= 3 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, collect_time, sla_overall_met,
         LAG(sla_overall_met) OVER (PARTITION BY vpn_id ORDER BY collect_time) AS prev_state
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
), switches AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN prev_state IS NOT NULL AND prev_state <> sla_overall_met THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS switch_count
  FROM ordered
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.switch_count
FROM switches s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE s.switch_count >= 3
ORDER BY s.switch_count DESC, v.vpn_name;

details.question: 找出最近7天同时满足高CPU（>80%）且高接口错误（总错误包>1000）的设备。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(1行) [列差异: 多列{'ne_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH high_cpu AS ( SELECT k.ne_id FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80 ), high_errors AS ( SELECT k.ne_id FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id HAVING SUM(COALESCE(k.in_error_packets, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_error_packets, 0)) > 1000 ) SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name FROM high_cpu hc JOIN high_errors he ON hc.ne_id = he.ne_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON hc.ne_id = ne.ne_id ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH cpu_hot AS (
  SELECT ne_id
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne_id
  HAVING AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80
), if_error_hot AS (
  SELECT ne_id
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne_id
  HAVING SUM(in_error_packets + out_error_packets) > 1000
)
SELECT ne.ne_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN cpu_hot c ON ne.ne_id = c.ne_id
JOIN if_error_hot e ON ne.ne_id = e.ne_id
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

details.question: 统计每条SRv6 Policy最近7天关联隧道的平均实测时延，并找出超过Policy约束的策略。
details.reason: 行数相同(1行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_latency_ms', 'max_latency_ms'}; 多列{'constraint_latency', 'avg_measured_latency'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH policy_tunnels AS ( SELECT t.policy_id, AVG(tk.latency_avg_ms) AS avg_measured_latency FROM t_tunnel t JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON t.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id WHERE tk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND t.policy_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.policy_id ) SELECT sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name, sp.max_latency_ms AS constraint_latency, pt.avg_measured_latency FROM policy_tunnels pt JOIN t_srv6_policy sp ON pt.policy_id = sp.policy_id WHERE sp.max_latency_ms IS NOT NULL AND pt.avg_measured_latency > sp.max_latency_ms ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name,
       ROUND(AVG(tk.latency_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,
       sp.max_latency_ms
FROM t_srv6_policy sp
JOIN t_tunnel t ON sp.policy_id = t.policy_id

details.question: 找出每个区域中合同金额最高的三个VPN客户（按客户总月租费）。
details.reason: 完全匹配
details.generated_sql: WITH cust_region_fee AS ( SELECT s.region, v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(COALESCE(v.monthly_fee, 0)) AS total_monthly_fee, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.region ORDER BY SUM(COALESCE(v.monthly_fee, 0)) DESC) AS rn FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id GROUP BY s.region, v.customer_id, v.customer_name ) SELECT region, customer_id, customer_name, total_monthly_fee FROM cust_region_fee WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY region, rn ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH customer_region_fee AS (
  SELECT s.region, v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(v.monthly_fee) AS total_monthly_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  GROUP BY s.region, v.customer_id, v.customer_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT region, customer_id, customer_name, total_monthly_fee,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY total_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, customer_id) AS rn
  FROM customer_region_fee
)
SELECT region, customer_id, customer_name, total_monthly_fee
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY region, rn;

details.question: 找出最近30天每个客户按平均时延/保证带宽定义的效率最差VPN。
details.reason: 行数相同(30行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'latency_per_mbps'}; 多列{'bandwidth_mbps', 'latency_per_bw', 'avg_latency_ms'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH vpn_perf AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG(sk.e2e_latency_avg_ms) AS avg_latency FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id ), vpn_eff AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, vp.avg_latency, v.bandwidth_mbps, CASE WHEN v.bandwidth_mbps > 0 THEN vp.avg_latency / v.bandwidth_mbps ELSE NULL END AS latency_per_bw, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY v.customer_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN v.bandwidth_mbps > 0 THEN vp.avg_latency / v.bandwidth_mbps ELSE 999999 END DESC) AS rn FROM vpn_perf vp JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vp.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.bandwidth_mbps > 0 ) SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(avg_latency, 2) AS avg_latency_ms, bandwidth_mbps, ROUND(latency_per_bw, 4) AS latency_per_bw FROM vpn_eff WHERE rn = 1 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH vpn_eff AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name,
         AVG(s.e2e_latency_avg_ms) / NULLIF(v.bandwidth_mbps, 0) AS latency_per_mbps
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND v.bandwidth_mbps IS NOT NULL AND v.bandwidth_mbps > 0
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.bandwidth_mbps
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY latency_per_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, vpn_id) AS rn
  FROM vpn_eff
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(latency_per_mbps, 6) AS latency_per_mbps
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY latency_per_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

details.question: 计算每个站点的网络压力指数 = 0.4×平均CPU + 0.3×平均内存 + 0.3×平均接口出方向利用率，并输出前10名。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(10行) [列差异: 多列{'site_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH site_cpu_mem AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu, AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY ne.site_id ), site_bw AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, AVG(ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik JOIN t_network_element ne ON ik.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE ik.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY ne.site_id ) SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, ROUND(0.4 * COALESCE(scm.avg_cpu, 0) + 0.3 * COALESCE(scm.avg_mem, 0) + 0.3 * COALESCE(sb.avg_out_bw, 0), 2) AS pressure_index FROM t_site s LEFT JOIN site_cpu_mem scm ON s.site_id = scm.site_id LEFT JOIN site_bw sb ON s.site_id = sb.site_id ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH ne_site AS (
  SELECT ne_id, site_id FROM t_network_element
), ne_metrics AS (
  SELECT n.site_id,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN ne_site n ON k.ne_id = n.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY n.site_id
), if_metrics AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
)
SELECT s.site_name,
       ROUND(0.4 * nm.avg_cpu + 0.3 * nm.avg_mem + 0.3 * im.avg_out_bw, 2) AS pressure_index
FROM t_site s
JOIN ne_metrics nm ON s.site_id = nm.site_id
JOIN if_metrics im ON s.site_id = im.site_id
ORDER BY pressure_index DESC, s.site_name
LIMIT 10;

details.question: 找出最近30天高价值高风险客户：PLATINUM/GOLD业务月租费总和排名前20%，且SLA达标率低于95%。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成3行 vs 期望6行 [列差异: 缺列{'premium_monthly_fee', 'sla_hit_rate_pct'}; 多列{'sla_met_rate_pct', 'total_fee'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH cust_fee AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(COALESCE(v.monthly_fee, 0)) AS total_fee FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ), fee_ranked AS ( SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank FROM cust_fee ), cust_sla AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_count FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id ) SELECT fr.customer_id, fr.customer_name, fr.total_fee, ROUND(cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples, 2) AS sla_met_rate_pct FROM fee_ranked fr JOIN cust_sla cs ON fr.customer_id = cs.customer_id WHERE fr.pct_rank <= 0.20 AND cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples < 95 ORDER BY fr.total_fee DESC ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH customer_value AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') THEN v.monthly_fee ELSE 0 END) AS premium_monthly_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
), customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN s.sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id
), ranked AS (
  SELECT cv.customer_id, cv.customer_name, cv.premium_monthly_fee, cs.hit_rate,
         NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY cv.premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST) AS value_bucket
  FROM customer_value cv
  JOIN customer_sla cs ON cv.customer_id = cs.customer_id
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, premium_monthly_fee,
       ROUND(hit_rate * 100, 2) AS sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE value_bucket = 1 AND hit_rate < 0.95
ORDER BY premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, sla_hit_rate_pct;

details.question: 统计每台PE设备上所有物理接口的带宽利用率分布（空闲<30%/正常30-70%/繁忙70-90%/过载>90%），只看最新一个采集周期。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(18行) [列差异: 缺列{'normal', 'overload', 'busy', 'idle'}; 多列{'normal_count', 'busy_count', 'ne_id', 'overload_count', 'idle_count'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH latest_time AS (SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi), bw AS (SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name, ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk JOIN t_interface i ON ipk.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON ipk.ne_id = ne.ne_id CROSS JOIN latest_time lt WHERE ipk.collect_time = lt.max_ct AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL') SELECT ne_id, ne_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct < 30) AS idle_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct >= 30 AND out_bandwidth_usage_pct <= 70) AS normal_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 70 AND out_bandwidth_usage_pct <= 90) AS busy_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 90) AS overload_count FROM bw GROUP BY ne_id, ne_name;
details.expected_sql:
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS t FROM t_interface_perf_kpi)
SELECT ne.ne_name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct < 30 THEN 1 END) AS idle,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct BETWEEN 30 AND 70 THEN 1 END) AS normal,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct BETWEEN 70 AND 90 THEN 1 END) AS busy,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 90 THEN 1 END) AS overload
FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
CROSS JOIN latest l
WHERE k.collect_time = l.t AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
ORDER BY overload DESC;

details.generated_sql: WITH vpn_sla AS (SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, sk.vpn_id, sk.sla_overall_met FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE') SELECT customer_id, customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT vpn_id) AS vpn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM vpn_sla GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;
details.expected_sql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count,
    COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violations
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v

details.question: 找出所有'单点故障'链路——两个站点之间只有一条物理链路、且该链路承载了GOLD级别VPN业务。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成37行 vs 期望22行 [列差异: 缺列{'link_name', 'distance_km', 'bandwidth_mbps'}; 多列{'link_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH site_pair_links AS (SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site_a, GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site_b, link_id, a_ne_id, z_ne_id FROM t_physical_link WHERE oper_status = 'UP'), single_links AS (SELECT site_a, site_b, MIN(link_id) AS link_id, MIN(a_ne_id) AS a_ne_id, MIN(z_ne_id) AS z_ne_id FROM site_pair_links GROUP BY site_a, site_b HAVING COUNT(*) = 1), gold_nes AS (SELECT DISTINCT b.ne_id FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD', 'PLATINUM')) SELECT sl.link_id, sl.site_a, sl.site_b FROM single_links sl WHERE sl.a_ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM gold_nes) OR sl.z_ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM gold_nes);
details.expected_sql:
WITH site_pair AS (
  SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s1,
         GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s2,
         COUNT(*) AS link_cnt, ARRAY_AGG(link_id) AS links
  FROM t_physical_link WHERE oper_status = 'UP'
  GROUP BY LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id), GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id)
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
gold_links AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT pl.link_id
  FROM t_physical_link pl
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON b.ne_id = pl.a_ne_id
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD','PLATINUM') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
)
SELECT pl.link_name, sa.site_name AS site_a, sz.site_name AS site_b,
       pl.bandwidth_mbps, pl.distance_km
FROM site_pair sp
JOIN t_physical_link pl ON pl.link_id = ANY(sp.links)
JOIN t_site sa ON sp.s1 = sa.site_id
JOIN t_site sz ON sp.s2 = sz.site_id
WHERE pl.link_id IN (SELECT link_id FROM gold_links);

details.question: 对比上周和本周各站点平均接口带宽利用率，找出增长超过20个百分点的站点。
details.reason: 行数相同(1行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'last_week', 'increase', 'this_week'}; 多列{'site_id', 'last_week_avg', 'this_week_avg', 'growth'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH bw_by_site_week AS (SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, CASE WHEN ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS week_bucket, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk JOIN t_network_element ne ON ipk.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '14' DAY GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name, week_bucket) SELECT t.site_id, t.site_name, l.avg_bw AS last_week_avg, t.avg_bw AS this_week_avg, t.avg_bw - l.avg_bw AS growth FROM bw_by_site_week t JOIN bw_by_site_week l ON t.site_id = l.site_id AND t.week_bucket = 'THIS' AND l.week_bucket = 'LAST' WHERE t.avg_bw - l.avg_bw > 20;
details.expected_sql:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS wk,
    AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END
)
SELECT tw.site_name,
  ROUND(lw.avg_bw, 2) AS last_week, ROUND(tw.avg_bw, 2) AS this_week,
  ROUND(tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw, 2) AS increase
FROM weekly tw JOIN weekly lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id
WHERE tw.wk = 'THIS' AND lw.wk = 'LAST' AND (tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw) > 20
ORDER BY increase DESC;

details.question: 为每条GOLD级VPN业务计算健康评分（时延达标+25分，抖动达标+25分，丢包达标+25分，可用率达标+25分），输出评分低于75分的业务。
details.reason: 行数相同(2行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_loss_pct', 'availability_pct', 'avg_latency_ms'}; 多列{'vpn_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH vpn_scores AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG( (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) ) AS health_score FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id) SELECT vs.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, vs.health_score FROM vpn_scores vs JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vs.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE vs.health_score < 75;
details.expected_sql:
WITH health AS (
  SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_latency_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_jitter_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_loss_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_availability_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS score,
    AVG(sk.e2e_latency_avg_ms) AS lat, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS loss,
    AVG(sk.availability_pct) AS avail
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
    AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
  GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
)
SELECT vpn_name, customer_name, ROUND(score, 1) AS health_score,
  ROUND(lat, 2) AS avg_latency_ms, ROUND(loss, 4) AS avg_loss_pct,
  ROUND(avail, 2) AS availability_pct
FROM health WHERE score < 75 ORDER BY score;

details.generated_sql: WITH latest_kpi AS (SELECT ipk.if_id, ipk.oper_status AS kpi_status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ipk.if_id ORDER BY ipk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk) SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id, i.oper_status AS base_status, lk.kpi_status FROM t_interface i JOIN latest_kpi lk ON i.if_id = lk.if_id AND lk.rn = 1 WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND lk.kpi_status = 'DOWN';
details.expected_sql:

  SELECT if_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY if_id
)
SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, ne.ne_name, i.oper_status AS inventory_oper_status, k.oper_status AS kpi_oper_status
FROM latest l
JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi k ON l.if_id = k.if_id AND l.max_time = k.collect_time
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND k.oper_status = 'DOWN'
ORDER BY ne.ne_name, i.if_name;

details.question: 找出最近24小时流量增长最快的前10个接口（对比前24小时平均出方向利用率）。
details.reason: 行数相同(10行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'previous_avg_pct', 'growth_pct_point', 'current_avg_pct', 'ne_name'}; 多列{'if_id', 'prev_avg', 'growth', 'ne_id', 'recent_avg'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH recent AS (SELECT ipk.if_id, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY ipk.if_id), previous AS (SELECT ipk.if_id, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND ipk.collect_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY ipk.if_id) SELECT r.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id, r.avg_bw AS recent_avg, p.avg_bw AS prev_avg, r.avg_bw - p.avg_bw AS growth FROM recent r JOIN previous p ON r.if_id = p.if_id JOIN t_interface i ON r.if_id = i.if_id ORDER BY growth DESC LIMIT 10;
details.expected_sql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT if_id,
         CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
              WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END AS win,
         AVG(out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  GROUP BY if_id,
           CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
                WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw, 2) AS current_avg_pct,
       ROUND(pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS previous_avg_pct,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw - pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS growth_pct_point
FROM bucketed cur
JOIN bucketed pre ON cur.if_id = pre.if_id AND cur.win = 'CUR' AND pre.win = 'PRE'
JOIN t_interface i ON cur.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
ORDER BY growth_pct_point DESC, ne.ne_name, i.if_name
LIMIT 10;

group_cols: case when collect_time >= now() - interval '24' hours then 'cur' when collect_time >= now() - interval '48' hours then 'pre' end

details.question: 找出那些最新SLA指标已不达标，但其承载隧道最新KPI仍显示sla_violation=FALSE的VPN。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成9行 vs 期望25行 [列差异: 缺列{'tunnel_name', 'sla_violation', 'sla_overall_met'}; 多列{'vpn_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH latest_vpn_sla AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, sk.sla_overall_met, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk), latest_tunnel_kpi AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, tk.sla_violation, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk.tunnel_id ORDER BY tk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk) SELECT DISTINCT lvs.vpn_id, v.vpn_name FROM latest_vpn_sla lvs JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON lvs.vpn_id = v.vpn_id JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', lvs.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON t.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE lvs.rn = 1 AND COALESCE(lvs.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE AND COALESCE(ltk.sla_violation, FALSE) = FALSE;
details.expected_sql:
WITH latest_vpn AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
), latest_tunnel AS (
  SELECT tunnel_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY tunnel_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name, sk.sla_overall_met, tk.sla_violation
FROM latest_vpn lv
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON lv.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id AND lv.max_time = sk.collect_time
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN latest_tunnel lt ON t.tunnel_id = lt.tunnel_id
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON lt.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id AND lt.max_time = tk.collect_time
WHERE sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE AND tk.sla_violation = FALSE
ORDER BY v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name;

details.question: 找出最近7天路径切换次数最多且同时发生SLA违规的前5条隧道。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(5行) [列差异: 缺列{'violation_samples'}; 多列{'tunnel_id', 'violation_count'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH tunnel_stats AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, SUM(tk.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk WHERE tk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY tk.tunnel_id) SELECT ts.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ts.total_path_changes, ts.violation_count FROM tunnel_stats ts JOIN t_tunnel t ON ts.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id WHERE ts.violation_count > 0 ORDER BY ts.total_path_changes DESC LIMIT 5;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT t.tunnel_name,
       SUM(k.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_samples
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi k
JOIN t_tunnel t ON k.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY t.tunnel_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN k.sla_violation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY total_path_changes DESC, violation_samples DESC, t.tunnel_name
LIMIT 5;

details.question: 统计每个区域内PLATINUM业务的平均SLA达标率。
details.reason: 完全匹配
details.generated_sql: WITH region_vpn AS (SELECT DISTINCT s.region, b.vpn_id FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM') SELECT rv.region, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS sla_met_rate_pct FROM region_vpn rv JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON rv.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id GROUP BY rv.region ORDER BY sla_met_rate_pct;
details.expected_sql:
WITH region_vpn AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_id, s.region
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM'
), hit_rate AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT rv.region, ROUND(AVG(hr.hit_rate) * 100, 2) AS avg_sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM region_vpn rv
JOIN hit_rate hr ON rv.vpn_id = hr.vpn_id
GROUP BY rv.region
ORDER BY avg_sla_hit_rate_pct DESC, rv.region;

details.question: 查询每个客户在最近30天的平均月化丢包风险，定义为平均丢包率 × 业务月租费。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成29行 vs 期望30行 [列差异: 缺列{'loss_fee_risk'}; 多列{'monthly_loss_risk'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH vpn_loss AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id) SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(vl.avg_loss * v.monthly_fee) AS monthly_loss_risk FROM vpn_loss vl JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vl.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ORDER BY monthly_loss_risk DESC;
details.expected_sql:
WITH vpn_loss AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.monthly_fee,
         AVG(s.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.monthly_fee
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name,
       ROUND(SUM(avg_loss * monthly_fee), 4) AS loss_fee_risk
FROM vpn_loss
GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name
ORDER BY loss_fee_risk DESC, customer_name;

details.question: 找出所有同时满足以下条件的PE：启用SRv6、存在LOW_LATENCY Policy、且最近7天平均CPU超过70%。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(1行) [列差异: 多列{'ne_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH low_latency_pe AS (SELECT DISTINCT sp.source_ne_id AS ne_id FROM t_srv6_policy sp WHERE sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY'), high_cpu_pe AS (SELECT k.ne_id FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70) SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name FROM t_network_element ne WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND COALESCE(ne.srv6_enabled, FALSE) = TRUE AND ne.ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM low_latency_pe) AND ne.ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM high_cpu_pe);
details.expected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ne.ne_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_srv6_policy sp ON sp.source_ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
  AND ne.srv6_enabled = TRUE
  AND sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY'
  AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY ne.ne_name
HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

details.question: 统计每个站点拥有的设备数量、物理链路端点数量。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(25行) [列差异: 缺列{'ne_count', 'link_end_count'}; 多列{'site_id', 'link_endpoint_count', 'device_count'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH ne_counts AS (SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS device_count FROM t_network_element GROUP BY site_id), link_counts AS (SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS link_endpoint_count FROM (SELECT a_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link UNION ALL SELECT z_site_id FROM t_physical_link) sub GROUP BY site_id) SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, COALESCE(nc.device_count, 0) AS device_count, COALESCE(lc.link_endpoint_count, 0) AS link_endpoint_count FROM t_site s LEFT JOIN ne_counts nc ON s.site_id = nc.site_id LEFT JOIN link_counts lc ON s.site_id = lc.site_id ORDER BY device_count DESC;
details.expected_sql:
WITH site_ne AS (
  SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS ne_count
  FROM t_network_element
  GROUP BY site_id
), site_link_end AS (
  SELECT site_id, COUNT(*) AS link_end_count
  FROM (
    SELECT a_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link
    UNION ALL
    SELECT z_site_id AS site_id FROM t_physical_link
  ) x
  GROUP BY site_id
)
SELECT s.site_name,
       COALESCE(n.ne_count, 0) AS ne_count,
       COALESCE(l.link_end_count, 0) AS link_end_count
FROM t_site s
LEFT JOIN site_ne n ON s.site_id = n.site_id
LEFT JOIN site_link_end l ON s.site_id = l.site_id
ORDER BY ne_count DESC, link_end_count DESC, s.site_name;

details.generated_sql: WITH tunnel_sla AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_samples FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk WHERE tk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY tk.tunnel_id) SELECT ts.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ROUND(ts.violation_samples * 100.0 / ts.total_samples, 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM tunnel_sla ts JOIN t_tunnel t ON ts.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id WHERE (ts.violation_samples * 100.0 / ts.total_samples) > 10 ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC;

FROM t_site s
JOIN ne_metrics nm ON s.site_id = nm.site_id
JOIN if_metrics im ON s.site_id = im.site_id
ORDER BY pressure_index DESC, s.site_name
LIMIT 10;

details.question: 找出最近30天高价值高风险客户：PLATINUM/GOLD业务月租费总和排名前20%，且SLA达标率低于95%。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成3行 vs 期望6行 [列差异: 缺列{'premium_monthly_fee', 'sla_hit_rate_pct'}; 多列{'sla_met_rate_pct', 'total_fee'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH customer_fee AS (SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(v.monthly_fee) AS total_fee FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name), fee_ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank FROM customer_fee), top20_customers AS (SELECT customer_id, customer_name, total_fee FROM fee_ranked WHERE pct_rank <= 0.20), customer_sla AS (SELECT v.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_samples FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id) SELECT tc.customer_id, tc.customer_name, tc.total_fee, ROUND(cs.met_samples * 100.0 / cs.total_samples, 2) AS sla_met_rate_pct FROM top20_customers tc JOIN customer_sla cs ON tc.customer_id = cs.customer_id WHERE (cs.met_samples * 100.0 / cs.total_samples) < 95 ORDER BY tc.total_fee DESC;
details.expected_sql:
WITH customer_value AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') THEN v.monthly_fee ELSE 0 END) AS premium_monthly_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
), customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN s.sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id
), ranked AS (
  SELECT cv.customer_id, cv.customer_name, cv.premium_monthly_fee, cs.hit_rate,
         NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY cv.premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST) AS value_bucket
  FROM customer_value cv
  JOIN customer_sla cs ON cv.customer_id = cs.customer_id
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, premium_monthly_fee,
       ROUND(hit_rate * 100, 2) AS sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE value_bucket = 1 AND hit_rate < 0.95
ORDER BY premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, sla_hit_rate_pct;

details.generated_sql: SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sk.kpi_id), 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count,
    COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violations
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
)
SELECT customer_name, vpn_count, violations, total_samples,
  ROUND(violations * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_samples, 0), 2) AS violation_rate_pct
FROM stats WHERE total_samples > 0
ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;

details.question: 找出所有'单点故障'链路——两个站点之间只有一条物理链路、且该链路承载了GOLD级别VPN业务。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成28行 vs 期望22行 [列差异: 缺列{'link_name', 'bandwidth_mbps', 'site_b', 'distance_km', 'site_a'}; 多列{'sla_class', 'link_id'}]
details.generated_sql: SELECT pl.link_id, pl.sla_class FROM t_physical_link pl WHERE COALESCE(pl.is_intra_site, FALSE) = FALSE AND pl.sla_class = 'GOLD' ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH site_pair AS (
  SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s1,
         GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS s2,
         COUNT(*) AS link_cnt, ARRAY_AGG(link_id) AS links
  FROM t_physical_link WHERE oper_status = 'UP'
  GROUP BY LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id), GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id)
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
gold_links AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT pl.link_id
  FROM t_physical_link pl
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON b.ne_id = pl.a_ne_id
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD','PLATINUM') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
)
SELECT pl.link_name, sa.site_name AS site_a, sz.site_name AS site_b,
       pl.bandwidth_mbps, pl.distance_km
FROM site_pair sp
JOIN t_physical_link pl ON pl.link_id = ANY(sp.links)
JOIN t_site sa ON sp.s1 = sa.site_id
JOIN t_site sz ON sp.s2 = sz.site_id
WHERE pl.link_id IN (SELECT link_id FROM gold_links);

details.question: 对比上周和本周各站点平均接口带宽利用率，找出增长超过20个百分点的站点。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成25行 vs 期望1行 [列差异: 缺列{'last_week', 'site_name', 'this_week', 'increase'}; 多列{'site_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH this_week AS (SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) GROUP BY ne.site_id), last_week AS (SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND kpi.collect_time < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) GROUP BY ne.site_id) SELECT tw.site_id FROM this_week tw JOIN last_week lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS wk,
    AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name,
    CASE WHEN k.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END
)
SELECT tw.site_name,
  ROUND(lw.avg_bw, 2) AS last_week, ROUND(tw.avg_bw, 2) AS this_week,
  ROUND(tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw, 2) AS increase
FROM weekly tw JOIN weekly lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id
WHERE tw.wk = 'THIS' AND lw.wk = 'LAST' AND (tw.avg_bw - lw.avg_bw) > 20
ORDER BY increase DESC;

details.question: 为每条GOLD级VPN业务计算健康评分（时延达标+25分，抖动达标+25分，丢包达标+25分，可用率达标+25分），输出评分低于75分的业务。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成3行 vs 期望2行 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_loss_pct', 'availability_pct', 'avg_latency_ms'}; 多列{'vpn_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH latest_sla AS (SELECT sk.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk) SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN latest_sla ls ON v.vpn_id = ls.vpn_id AND ls.rn = 1 WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) < 75 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH health AS (
  SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_latency_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_jitter_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_loss_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) +
    AVG(CASE WHEN sk.sla_availability_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS score,
    AVG(sk.e2e_latency_avg_ms) AS lat, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS loss,
    AVG(sk.availability_pct) AS avail
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
    AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
  GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
)
SELECT vpn_name, customer_name, ROUND(score, 1) AS health_score,
  ROUND(lat, 2) AS avg_latency_ms, ROUND(loss, 4) AS avg_loss_pct,
  ROUND(avail, 2) AS availability_pct
FROM health WHERE score < 75 ORDER BY score;

details.generated_sql: WITH latest_kpi AS (SELECT if_id, oper_status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY if_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_interface_perf_kpi) SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id FROM t_interface i JOIN latest_kpi lk ON i.if_id = lk.if_id AND lk.rn = 1 WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND lk.oper_status = 'DOWN' ;

  SELECT if_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_time
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY if_id
)
SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, ne.ne_name, i.oper_status AS inventory_oper_status, k.oper_status AS kpi_oper_status
FROM latest l
JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi k ON l.if_id = k.if_id AND l.max_time = k.collect_time
JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND k.oper_status = 'DOWN'
ORDER BY ne.ne_name, i.if_name;

  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s

details.question: 计算每台PE设备最近7天的综合健康分：CPU、内存、温度、告警四项各25分，要求输出低于60分的设备。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成2行 vs 期望1行 [列差异: 缺列{'ne_name', 'avg_mem', 'health_score', 'avg_temp', 'avg_alarm_pressure'}; 多列{'ne_id', 'cpu_score'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH pe_stats AS (SELECT ne.ne_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_network_element ne JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND k.cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ne.ne_id) SELECT ne_id, avg_cpu, CASE WHEN avg_cpu <= 50 THEN 25 WHEN avg_cpu <= 80 THEN 25 * (1 - (avg_cpu - 50) / 50.0) ELSE 0 END AS cpu_score FROM pe_stats WHERE CASE WHEN avg_cpu <= 50 THEN 25 WHEN avg_cpu <= 80 THEN 25 * (1 - (avg_cpu - 50) / 50.0) ELSE 0 END < 15 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem,
         AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) AS avg_temp,
         AVG(k.alarm_critical_count + k.alarm_major_count) AS avg_alarm_pressure
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
    AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name
)
SELECT ne_name,
       (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_mem < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN avg_alarm_pressure < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score,
       ROUND(avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu,
       ROUND(avg_mem, 2) AS avg_mem,
       ROUND(avg_temp, 2) AS avg_temp,
       ROUND(avg_alarm_pressure, 2) AS avg_alarm_pressure
FROM agg
WHERE (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_mem < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_alarm_pressure < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) < 60
ORDER BY health_score, ne_name;

details.question: 找出最近24小时流量增长最快的前10个接口（对比前24小时平均出方向利用率）。
details.reason: 行数相同(10行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'ne_name', 'if_name', 'growth_pct_point', 'previous_avg_pct', 'current_avg_pct'}; 多列{'if_id'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH recent AS (SELECT if_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY if_id), prev AS (SELECT if_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY if_id) SELECT r.if_id FROM recent r JOIN prev p ON r.if_id = p.if_id ORDER BY r.sample_count - p.sample_count DESC LIMIT 10 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT if_id,
         CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
              WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END AS win,
         AVG(out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  GROUP BY if_id,
           CASE WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'CUR'
                WHEN collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' THEN 'PRE' END
)
SELECT ne.ne_name, i.if_name,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw, 2) AS current_avg_pct,
       ROUND(pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS previous_avg_pct,
       ROUND(cur.avg_out_bw - pre.avg_out_bw, 2) AS growth_pct_point
FROM bucketed cur
JOIN bucketed pre ON cur.if_id = pre.if_id AND cur.win = 'CUR' AND pre.win = 'PRE'
JOIN t_interface i ON cur.if_id = i.if_id
JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
ORDER BY growth_pct_point DESC, ne.ne_name, i.if_name
LIMIT 10;

group_cols: case when collect_time >= now() - interval '24' hours then 'cur' when collect_time >= now() - interval '48' hours then 'pre' end

JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN latest_tunnel lt ON t.tunnel_id = lt.tunnel_id
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON lt.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id AND lt.max_time = tk.collect_time
WHERE sk.sla_overall_met = FALSE AND tk.sla_violation = FALSE
ORDER BY v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_name;

details.question: 统计每个区域内PLATINUM业务的平均SLA达标率。
details.reason: 行数相同(5行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_sla_hit_rate_pct'}; 多列{'total_samples', 'compliance_rate', 'met_count'}]
details.generated_sql: SELECT s.region, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sk.kpi_id), 2) AS compliance_rate FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM' GROUP BY s.region ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH region_vpn AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT v.vpn_id, s.region
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM'
), hit_rate AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT rv.region, ROUND(AVG(hr.hit_rate) * 100, 2) AS avg_sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM region_vpn rv
JOIN hit_rate hr ON rv.vpn_id = hr.vpn_id
GROUP BY rv.region
ORDER BY avg_sla_hit_rate_pct DESC, rv.region;

details.question: 查询每个客户在最近30天的平均月化丢包风险，定义为平均丢包率 × 业务月租费。

details.expected_sql:
WITH vpn_loss AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.monthly_fee,
         AVG(s.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.monthly_fee
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name,
       ROUND(SUM(avg_loss * monthly_fee), 4) AS loss_fee_risk
FROM vpn_loss
GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name
ORDER BY loss_fee_risk DESC, customer_name;

details.generated_sql: SELECT s.region, COUNT(kpi.kpi_id) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY s.region ;
details.expected_sql:

       ROUND(AVG(k.in_discard_packets + k.out_discard_packets), 2) AS avg_discard_packets

details.question: 找出站点等级为TIER1且拥有至少2台PE的城市。

details.generated_sql: SELECT s.site_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ne.ne_id) AS pe_count FROM t_site s JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id WHERE s.tier = 'TIER1' AND ne.role = 'PE' GROUP BY s.site_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ne.ne_id) >= 2 ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT s.city, COUNT(DISTINCT ne.ne_id) AS pe_count
FROM t_site s
JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id

details.question: 查询最近7天每个客户的平均时延和平均抖动，并仅保留GOLD/PLATINUM客户。

details.generated_sql: SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.service_level, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS latency_violations, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS jitter_violations FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD', 'PLATINUM') AND sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.service_level ;
details.expected_sql:

       ROUND(AVG(s.e2e_latency_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,
       ROUND(AVG(s.e2e_jitter_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_jitter_ms
FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD', 'PLATINUM')
  AND s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC, avg_jitter_ms DESC, v.customer_name;

details.question: 找出最近30天内至少出现过3次SLA状态切换（达标/不达标变化）的VPN。
details.reason: 逻辑正确，列选择不同(28行) [列差异: 缺列{'vpn_name', 'switch_count', 'customer_name'}; 多列{'switches'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH sla_changes AS (SELECT vpn_id, sla_overall_met, LAG(sla_overall_met) OVER (PARTITION BY vpn_id ORDER BY collect_time) AS prev_met FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY), switch_count AS (SELECT vpn_id, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sla_overall_met, FALSE) != COALESCE(prev_met, FALSE) AND prev_met IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS switches FROM sla_changes GROUP BY vpn_id) SELECT vpn_id, switches FROM switch_count WHERE switches >= 3 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT vpn_id, collect_time, sla_overall_met,
         LAG(sla_overall_met) OVER (PARTITION BY vpn_id ORDER BY collect_time) AS prev_state
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
), switches AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN prev_state IS NOT NULL AND prev_state <> sla_overall_met THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS switch_count
  FROM ordered
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, s.switch_count
FROM switches s
JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE s.switch_count >= 3
ORDER BY s.switch_count DESC, v.vpn_name;

details.question: 找出最近7天同时满足高CPU（>80%）且高接口错误（总错误包>1000）的设备。
details.reason: 行数相同(1行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'ne_name'}; 多列{'ne_id', 'avg_cpu'}]
details.generated_sql: SELECT ne_id, AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ne_id HAVING AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH cpu_hot AS (
  SELECT ne_id
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne_id
  HAVING AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80
), if_error_hot AS (
  SELECT ne_id
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne_id
  HAVING SUM(in_error_packets + out_error_packets) > 1000
)
SELECT ne.ne_name
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN cpu_hot c ON ne.ne_id = c.ne_id
JOIN if_error_hot e ON ne.ne_id = e.ne_id
ORDER BY ne.ne_name;

details.question: 统计每条SRv6 Policy最近7天关联隧道的平均实测时延，并找出超过Policy约束的策略。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成12行 vs 期望1行 [列差异: 缺列{'avg_latency_ms', 'max_latency_ms'}; 多列{'tunnel_count'}]
details.generated_sql: SELECT sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.tunnel_id) AS tunnel_count FROM t_srv6_policy sp JOIN t_tunnel t ON sp.policy_id = t.policy_id JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi kpi ON t.tunnel_id = kpi.tunnel_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name ;
details.expected_sql:
SELECT sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name,
       ROUND(AVG(tk.latency_avg_ms), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,
       sp.max_latency_ms
FROM t_srv6_policy sp
JOIN t_tunnel t ON sp.policy_id = t.policy_id

GROUP BY sp.policy_id, sp.policy_name, sp.max_latency_ms
HAVING AVG(tk.latency_avg_ms) > sp.max_latency_ms
ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC, sp.policy_name;

details.question: 找出最近30天每个客户按平均时延/保证带宽定义的效率最差VPN。
details.reason: 行数相同(30行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'vpn_name', 'latency_per_mbps'}; 多列{'latency_violation_pct'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH vpn_latency_violations AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS latency_violation_pct FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id, v.customer_id, v.customer_name), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY latency_violation_pct DESC) AS rn FROM vpn_latency_violations) SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, latency_violation_pct FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH vpn_eff AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name,
         AVG(s.e2e_latency_avg_ms) / NULLIF(v.bandwidth_mbps, 0) AS latency_per_mbps
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND v.bandwidth_mbps IS NOT NULL AND v.bandwidth_mbps > 0
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.bandwidth_mbps
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY latency_per_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, vpn_id) AS rn
  FROM vpn_eff
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_id, vpn_name, ROUND(latency_per_mbps, 6) AS latency_per_mbps
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY latency_per_mbps DESC NULLS LAST, customer_name;

details.question: 计算每个站点的网络压力指数 = 0.4×平均CPU + 0.3×平均内存 + 0.3×平均接口出方向利用率，并输出前10名。
details.reason: 行数相同(10行)但值不同: 0行重合 [列差异: 缺列{'site_name'}; 多列{'site_id', 'avg_cpu'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH site_cpu AS (SELECT ne.site_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND k.cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ne.site_id) SELECT site_id, avg_cpu, 0.4 * avg_cpu AS pressure_index FROM site_cpu ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH ne_site AS (
  SELECT ne_id, site_id FROM t_network_element
), ne_metrics AS (
  SELECT n.site_id,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN ne_site n ON k.ne_id = n.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY n.site_id
), if_metrics AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
)
SELECT s.site_name,
       ROUND(0.4 * nm.avg_cpu + 0.3 * nm.avg_mem + 0.3 * im.avg_out_bw, 2) AS pressure_index
FROM t_site s
JOIN ne_metrics nm ON s.site_id = nm.site_id
JOIN if_metrics im ON s.site_id = im.site_id
ORDER BY pressure_index DESC, s.site_name
LIMIT 10;

details.question: 找出最近30天高价值高风险客户：PLATINUM/GOLD业务月租费总和排名前20%，且SLA达标率低于95%。
details.reason: 行数不同: 生成3行 vs 期望6行 [列差异: 缺列{'premium_monthly_fee', 'sla_hit_rate_pct'}; 多列{'total_fee', 'sla_compliance_rate'}]
details.generated_sql: WITH customer_fees AS (SELECT customer_id, customer_name, SUM(monthly_fee) AS total_fee FROM t_l3vpn_service WHERE service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND monthly_fee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name), fee_ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank FROM customer_fees), customer_sla AS (SELECT v.customer_id, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_count FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id) SELECT fr.customer_id, fr.customer_name, fr.total_fee, ROUND(cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples, 2) AS sla_compliance_rate FROM fee_ranked fr JOIN customer_sla cs ON fr.customer_id = cs.customer_id WHERE fr.pct_rank <= 0.20 AND cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples < 95 ;
details.expected_sql:
WITH customer_value AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') THEN v.monthly_fee ELSE 0 END) AS premium_monthly_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
), customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id,
         AVG(CASE WHEN s.sla_overall_met THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi s
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON s.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE s.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY v.customer_id
), ranked AS (
  SELECT cv.customer_id, cv.customer_name, cv.premium_monthly_fee, cs.hit_rate,
         NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY cv.premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST) AS value_bucket
  FROM customer_value cv
  JOIN customer_sla cs ON cv.customer_id = cs.customer_id
)
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, premium_monthly_fee,
       ROUND(hit_rate * 100, 2) AS sla_hit_rate_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE value_bucket = 1 AND hit_rate < 0.95
ORDER BY premium_monthly_fee DESC NULLS LAST, sla_hit_rate_pct;
